snippet.title: Tabaahi 🔥| Toxic (Hindi) | Rocking Star Yash, Kiara Advani, Tara Sutaria| Vishal Mishra, Raj Shekhar
snippet.description:
Tabaahi ❤️✨ — a melody that speaks straight to the heart.

Featuring Yash and Kiara Advani, this soulful track is beautifully sung and composed by Vishal Mishra. Let its heartfelt lyrics and mesmerizing melody stay with you long after the music ends. 🎶

🎵 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁𝘀
Song: Tabaahi
Movie: Toxic
Vocal & Composition: Vishal Mishra
Lyrics: Raj Shekhar
Music Assistants: Kumar Gaurav Singh, Trihangku Lahkar, Bitupon Boruah & Kandarpa Kalita
Music Production: Vishal Mishra, Bitupon Boruah, Kandarpa Kalita & Trihangku Lahkar
Guitars: Kandarpa Kalita
Drums: Trihangku Lahkar
Synths: Kandarpa Kalita & Bitupon Boruah
Backing Vocals: Kandarpa Kalita, Bitupon Boruah & Trihangku Lahkar
Brass & Woodwinds Arranged by: Vishal Mishra 
Dubbed in Prague by: Steve Ferry 
Vocal Dub Coordinator: Santhosh Venky
Recorded & Mixed by Trihangku Lahkar @VMS
Mastered by Dave Kutch at The Mastering Palace

🎬 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁 & 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝘄
Starring: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria & Rukmini Vasanth
Written by: Yash & Geetu Mohandas
Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions & Monster Mind Creations

𝗧𝗼 𝗦𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗺 & 𝗗𝗼𝘄𝗻𝗹𝗼𝗮𝗱 𝗙𝘂𝗹𝗹 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴:
Spotify - https://bit.ly/40HGcWM
JioSaavn - https://bit.ly/4r64g0r
Gaana - https://bit.ly/4cj2wxf
iTunes - https://apple.co/4b08NLV
Apple Music - https://apple.co/4b08NLV
Amazon Prime Music - https://amzn.to/4aIOT9n
YouTube Music - https://bit.ly/46A0DIV

Lyrics:
तोड़ो, सारे उसूलों को
छोड़ो, जाने दो भूलो को
तू हो बाहों में Aur  हर जगह तबाही
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही ..

Todo, Saare Usoolon Ko
Chhodo, Jaane Do Bhoolo Ko
Tu Ho Baahon Mein Aur Har Jagah Tabaahi
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

ये लहर, ये हवा
कब चली पूछ के
रूह पे, क्यूँ भला
हो कोई बंदिशें
दुनिया के दस्तूर से आज ले रिहाई
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही ..

Yeh Lahar, Yeh Hawaa
Kab Chali Poochke
Rooh Pe, Kyun Bhala
Ho Koi Bandishein
Duniya Ke Dastoor Se Aaj Le Rihaayii
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

तू मुझे छील दे सांस की आग से
हर धड़क पे दोनो हो फना राख से
हर गलत सही-रेत पे लिखी गवाही
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही

Tu Mujhe Chheel De, Saans Ki Aag Se
Har Dhadak Pe Dono Ho Fana Raakh Se
Har Galat Sahi- Ret Pe Likhi Gawaahi
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

#Tabaahi #Toxic #ToxicAFairyTale #Yash #RockingStarYash #GeetuMohandas #KiaraAdvani

snippet.description:

Lyrics :- 

Nahi jeena tere baaju
Nahi jeena, nahi jeena
Nahi jeena tere baaju
Nahi jeena, nahi jeena (x2)
(tere baaju: without you)

Main tenu samjhawan ki
Na tere bina lagda jee
Main tenu samjhawan ki
Na tere bina lagda jee
Tu ki jaane pyaar mera
Main karoon intezar tera
Tu dil tui-yon jaan meri

Main tenu samjhava ki
Na tere bina lagda jee
Tu ki jaane pyaar mera
Main karoon intezar tera
Tu dil tui yon jaan meri
Main tenu samjhawa ki
Na tere bina lagda jee

Mere dil ne chun laiyaa ne
Tere dil diyaan raahan
Tu jo mere naal tu rehta
Turpe meriyaan saaha
Jeena mera.. hoye
Hun hai tera, ki main karaan
Tu kar aitbaar mera
Main karoon intezar tera
Tu dil tui-yon jaan meri
Main tenu samjhawan kee
Na tere bina lagda jee

Ve changa nahion keeta beeba
Ve changa nahion keeta beeba
Dil mera tod ke
Ve bada pachhtaiyaan akhaan
Ve bada pachhtaiyaan akhaan
Naal tere jod ke

Tenu chadd ke kitthe jawan
Tu mera parchhanvaa
Tere mukhde vich hi main taan
Rab nu apne pawaan
Meri duaa.. haaye
Sajda tera kardi sadaa
Tu sun iqraar mera
Main karoon intezar tera
Tu dil tui-yon jaan meri

Main tainu samjhawan ki
Na tere bina lagda jee

snippet.title: Baap Vithuraya l Rinku Rajguru l Ajay Gogawale l Padmanabh Gaikwad l Vitthal Song l बाप विठूराया
snippet.description:
🙏 @saregamamarathi सादर करत आहे "Baap Vithuraya", Ajay Gogavale यांच्या भावपूर्ण आवाजात, Padmanabh Gaikwad यांच्या सुरेल संगीताने आणि Rinku Rajguru यांच्या प्रभावी अभिनयाने साकारलेले एक हृदयस्पर्शी विठ्ठलभक्ती गीत. आषाढी वारीचा भक्तिभाव, विठ्ठलावरील श्रद्धा आणि भक्त-भगवंत यांच्यातील अतूट नात्याचा सुंदर अनुभव या गीतातून मिळतो.

Featuring: Rinku Rajguru
Supporting Cast: Sayali Patil

Audio Credits

Singer: Ajay Gogavale
Music Composition, Arrangement, Programmed & Produced by: Padmanabh Gaikwad
Lyrics: Hrishikesh Vidar
Rhythm: Pratik Kawale, Omkar Ingawale, Runal Sawant
Chorus: Surabhi Khekale, Bandita Bharti, Arohi Prabhu Desai, Anurag Patil, Anurag Puranik, Aniket Ghaytadke, Nitin Ugalmugale, Pawan Lonkar, Mukund Bhalerao
Ajay Gogavale's Vocals Recorded by: Vijay Dayal & Sagar Sathe @ Yash Raj Studios, Mumbai
Rhythm Recorded by: Harsh Bhoir @ Asia Music Vision Recording Studio, Mumbai
Chorus Recorded by: Vinaayak Pawwar @ Soundideaz Studios, Mumbai
Mixed & Mastered by: Vinaayak Pawwar

Project Head: Manisha Shinde

Video Credits

Sreenplay & Directed By: Manish Mahajan
Director of Photography (DOP): Dilip Gangode (DG)
Executive Producer: Sharad Jhopale
Supporting actor: Vishal Raut, Vipul Dhavan
Direction Team: Vipul Dhavan, Vishal Raut, Sam Khane
Project Head: Nilesh kshirsagar
Asst. DOP: Sunny Shinde, Vikram Bhalerao
Editor: Manish Mahajan
Line Producer: Aditya Indarkhe
Junior artists cordinator: Shiva Jhatale
DI & Colorist: Ink Blaze Studio
Makeup - Hair: Sandya & Gajal
Costumes: Akash Aher & Tapasya Pande
Drone Pilot: Saurabh Rathod & Nilesh kshirsagar
Still Photographer: Avinash Gaikwad
BTS: Sushant
Art: Saurabh Ahire
Light: Sanju & Team
Production team: Navnath Gawali, Vaibhav Gaikwad
Poster: Vinayak Lokhare
Waari Footage: Prathamesh Prakash Avasare, Aniket Nakhate

Rinku’s Team

Managed by: Pooja Warad
Makeup: Sandeep Chaudhary
Hair: Gazal Rayan

Lyrics:

देवाचिये द्वारी, उभा क्षणभरी,
तेणे मुक्ती चारी साधियेल्या. 
हरी मुखे म्हणा, हरी मुखे म्हणा, 
पुण्याची गणना कोण करी. 

श्वासांत विठ्ठल, देहात विठ्ठल
स्नेहात विठ्ठल, ओथंबला

डोळ्यांत विठ्ठल, आशेत विठ्ठल
हृदयात विठ्ठल, ओसंडला

मेघांत विठ्ठल, भूमीत विठ्ठल
जीवांत विठ्ठल, बा सावळा 

बोलतो विठ्ठल, पाहतो विठ्ठल
हा देखणा सोहळा

तोच माय, तोच बाप विठुराया, पंढरीचा 

आलो भेटीला सख्या श्रीरंगा, रे विठ्ठला

रूप पाहतां लोचनी,
सुख जाले वो साजणी
तो हा विठ्ठल बरवा,
तो हा माधव बरवा 

विठुनामाचा गजर 
डोईवरी ती तुळस
पंढरीचा रे कळस
पाहता हर्ष डोळ्यांतूनी दाटला 

वारी माझ्या विठ्ठलाची
जन्मजन्माच्या सुखाची
जगण्याच्या रिंगणाची 
पांडुरंगी असा जीव रे रंगला 

पाऊल बाळाचे धावते मातेसी 
तैसे विठूपासी जाणे आम्हां 

सागरा शेवटी जैसी नदी जाय 
तैसे विठूमय होणे आम्हां 

सांगतो विठ्ठल, ऐकतो विठ्ठल
हा देखणा सोहळा 

तोच माय तोच बाप विठुराया पंढरीचा 
आलो भेटीला सख्या श्रीरंगा रे विठ्ठला

रूप पाहतां लोचनी,
सुख जाले वो साजणी
तो हा विठ्ठल बरवा
तो हा माधव बरवा

Song Credits:

Movie: Khuddar (1994)

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: N. R. Pachisia
Director: Iqbal Durrani

Song Lyrics:

Barsat Ka Mausam Yahan Hum Yahan Tum
Sajni Ko Milgaye Saajan Saajan Saajan
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum
Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Lakho Hai Magar Tumsa Yahan
Kaun Haseen Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Lakhon Hai Magar Tumsa Yaha Kaun Haseen Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhen Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Sau Phool Khile Jab Ye Khila Roop Sunhara
Sau Chand Bane Jab Ye Bana Chand Sa Chehra

Sau Chand Bane Jab Ye Bana Chand Sa Chehra
Itna Bhi Koi Pyar Ki Raho Mein Ghoom Na Ho
Bas Hosh Hai Itna Mere Saath Mein Tum Ho
Mere Saath Me Tum Ho, Mere Saath Me Tum Ho
Dhadkan Hai Kahin Dil Hai Kahin Jaan Kahin Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Ye Chandani In Ankhon Ka Saya To Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Ye Hoth Ye Palke Ye Nighahe Ye Adaye
Miljaye Khuda Mujhko Toh Main Lelu Balaaye
Duniya Ka Koi Bhi Gham Mere Paas Na Hoga
Tum Saath Mein Chaloge Toh Ye Ehsaas Na Hoga
Ehsaas Na Hoga, Ehsaas Na Hoga
Akash Hai Pairon Mein Hamare Ke Zameen Hai
Tum Jan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi
Aisa Koi Mahbub Jamane Me Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Lakho Hai Magar Tumsa Yaha Kaun Hasi Hai
Tum Jan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
“Forgive me for all I’ve done” Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters and IMAX December 18. #DuneMovie#FilmedforIMAX

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes Dune: Part Three, bringing Academy Award-nominated filmmaker Denis Villeneuve’s epic trilogy to a breathtaking conclusion.

Dune: Part Three is set nearly two decades after Paul Atreides seized control of the Imperium. Now a ruthless Emperor, Paul must face the consequences of his reign as old allies return, terrifying new threats emerge, and betrayal lurks in every shadow. Haunted by visions of Imperial collapse and the reappearance of his long-lost love, Paul is drawn into a sweeping conspiracy, with Chani at the heart of its unfolding mystery. As rebellion brews and enemies close in, Paul must confront the true cost of power and the fate of those he loves the most.

The film stars Oscar nominee Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Oscar nominee Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach de Bankolé, with Oscar nominee Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Oscar winner Javier Bardem.

Villeneuve directs from a screenplay by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, based on the novels written by Frank Herbert. The film is produced by Oscar nominees Mary Parent, Cale Boyter, Villeneuve and Tanya Lapointe, and Joe Caracciolo, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Thomas Tull, Herbert W. Gains, Brian Herbert, Byron Merritt, Kim Herbert, Kevin J. Anderson, Richard P. Rubinstein, John Harrison and Jessica Derhammer.

Joining Villeneuve behind the camera are Oscar-winning director of photography Linus Sandgren, Oscar-winning production designer Patrice Vermette, Oscar-winning editor Joe Walker, Oscar nominated costume designer Jacqueline West, Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler, and Oscar-winning composer Hans Zimmer.

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present A Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Denis Villeneuve, Dune: Part Three, only in theaters and IMAX® across North America on December 18, 2026 and internationally beginning 16 December 2026. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures and in China by Legendary East.
